name: DesignOptionsCommands
summary: Tapir Add-On 'Design Options Commands' command group — 3 JSON-RPC commands.

methods.name: GetDesignOptions
methods.summary: Retrieves information about existing design options. Available from Archicad 29.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: designOptions.

methods.name: GetDesignOptionSets
methods.summary: Retrieves information about existing design option sets. Available from Archicad 29.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: designOptionSets.

methods.name: GetDesignOptionCombinations
methods.summary: Retrieves information about existing design option combinations.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: designOptionCombinations.
